title: malcolmia orsiniana subsp. orsiniana
intro: Malcolmia orsiniana subsp. orsiniana, also known as the Albanian rock-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Malcolmia orsiniana subsp. orsiniana are said to include the treatment of various conditions, including wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried extract or tincture, and can also be found in ointments and creams, where it is valued for its antiseptic and soothing properties.
